description: Introducing the stylish Audi A3 Sedan 1.8 TFSI SE, a vibrant red beauty that's perfect for those who love a mix of fun and practicality. With a sleek body and a punchy 132kW petrol engine, this car offers an exhilarating drive with a top speed of 242 km/h. Its manual transmission ensures you stay connected to the road, while features like cruise control and electric windows add to the driving comfort. Safety is prioritised with seven airbags and ABS as standard, providing peace of mind on every journey. The full service record guarantees reliable performance, complemented by LED and Xenon lights that light up the night. The sunroof invites the outdoors in, making every trip a special occasion.
A striking blue 2014 BMW 320i M Sport Auto, finished in good condition with the M Sport package. Five-seat, 4x2 layout with petrol engine and automatic transmission for an easy, confident drive.
A 2021 Hyundai Creta 1.5D Executive Auto in excellent condition, finished in red. Diesel automatic, five-seat SUV layout with the practicality and efficiency the Creta is known for.

This stylish white vehicle combines practicality with comfort, featuring leather seats and a suite of modern options including electric windows, air conditioning, cruise control, and park distance control to make every journey smooth and enjoyable. Equipped with a reliable automatic transmission and a robust 125kW diesel engine, it offers a maximum speed of 180 km/h and a fuel efficiency averaging 9.8 litres per 100 km. Safety is a priority with four airbags, ABS as standard, and an alarm system to keep you secure.
A 2018 Kia Sportage 2.0 Ignite Manual Petrol in excellent condition, finished in white. Five-seat, 4x2 SUV layout -- practical, well-kept family transport.
A 2015 Nissan X-Trail 1.6 dCi XE 5-Seater in excellent condition, finished in silver. Diesel manual, 4x2 -- a dependable family SUV.

Discover the stylish and reliable Renault Duster 1.5 dCi Prestige Auto in a striking blue finish, perfect for urban adventures or countryside escapes. With a modest 83,660 km on the clock, this excellent condition crossover combines practicality with flair. Its automatic dual-clutch transmission ensures smooth driving, while the 80kW diesel engine delivers an impressive fuel range of approximately 1042 km and fuel efficiency of just 4.8 L/100 km. The Duster is packed with features including four airbags, ABS, LED lights, rear-view camera, air conditioning, and a sophisticated alarm system for added safety and comfort. Enjoy luxe leather seats and the convenience of electric windows, park distance control, cruise control, and a quality radio to keep you entertained.
A 2019 Volkswagen Polo 1.0 TSI Comfortline Manual in good condition, finished in gold. Five-seat, 4x2 hatchback layout with petrol engine and manual transmission.

A 2016 Volkswagen Polo GTI Auto -- the 1.8 TSI hot hatch with 141kW on tap, 0-100 km/h in 6.7s, and fuel consumption of 5.6L/100km. Five-seat layout, automatic transmission, finished in blue with the GTI's signature red detailing.
A 2021 Volkswagen T-Cross 1.0 TSI Comfortline Auto in good condition with low mileage, finished in green. Petrol automatic, 4x2 crossover layout.
